data.name: MensajeBienvenida
data.value: Welcome back to RayoExpres. What are you craving today?

data.name: NoHayRestaurantes
data.value: No restaurants available at the moment.

data.name: TituloHero
data.value: Your favorite food, delivered in Ibarra at lightning speed.

data.name: SubtituloHero
data.value: Order from the best restaurants with secure payments and ultra-fast deliveries.

data.name: SeleccionaTipoCuenta
data.value: Select the type of account you want to create:

data.name: SoyClienteDesc
data.value: I want to order food delivery from my favorite restaurant.

data.name: SoyRepartidorDesc
data.value: I want to make deliveries and earn money with my vehicle.

data.name: SoyRestauranteDesc
data.value: I want to list my business and receive orders online.

data.name: RegRepartidorDesc
data.value: Complete the form to join as a RayoExpres driver. Your account will be reviewed before activation.

data.name: ConfirmarTipoDesc
data.value: Select and click "Confirm Type" to update required fields.

data.name: FotoLicenciaDesc
data.value: Attach a clear photo of your driver license.

data.name: BuscaDireccionMapa
data.value: Search your address or drag the marker on the map.

data.name: El email no tiene un formato válido
El nombre del propietario es obligatorio
El nombre del restaurante es obligatorio
El número de licencia es requerido
El tipo de vehículo es requerido
La confirmación de la contraseña es obligatoria
La contraseña debe tener al menos 6 caracteres
data.value: Password must be at least 6 characters

data.name: Los apellidos del propietario son obligatorios
Seleccione su ubicación en el mapa
data.value: Select your location on the map

data.name: Ocurrió un error al registrar el usuario. Es posible que el correo o la cédula ya estén registrados.
data.value: An error occurred while registering the user. The email or ID may already be registered.

data.name: La fotografía de la licencia es obligatoria para motos y carros.
data.value: A license photo is mandatory for motorcycles and cars.

data.name: Registro exitoso. Tu cuenta está pendiente de aprobación por el administrador.
data.value: Registration successful. Your account is pending administrator approval.

data.name: No se pudo completar el registro. El correo puede ya estar registrado.
data.value: Registration could not be completed. The email may already be registered.

data.name: Hubo un error en el registro. Verifique que el correo o RUC no estén en uso.
data.value: There was a registration error. Check that the email or Tax ID are not in use.

data.name: SeleccioneDireccionMapa
data.value: Select an address on the map

data.name: BuscarCallePlaceHolder
data.value: ðŸ” Type to search for a street or place...

data.name: ArrastrarMarcadorDesc
data.value: ðŸ“ You can drag the red marker to refine your exact location.

data.name: GuardarDireccionParaCompras
data.value: Save this address for my next purchases

data.name: TransferenciaInstrucciones
data.value: Please transfer to the following account and attach the receipt (JPG, PNG, PDF).

data.name: CarritoVacioDesc
data.value: Explore restaurants and add products to start your order.

data.name: SinDireccionAlert
data.value: You have no registered delivery address.

data.name: SinDireccionDesc
data.value: You must add an address before confirming your order.

data.name: GestionaCupones
data.value: Manage your discount coupons and promo codes.

data.name: SinCupones
data.value: You have no registered coupons yet.

data.name: SinCuponesDesc
data.value: Enter a code above to add it to your account.

data.name: BuscaMapaDireccionDesc
data.value: Search on the map or click to locate your exact address.

data.name: BuscaBarrioMapaDesc
data.value: Search for your neighborhood or street and click on the map.

data.name: EjemploReferencia
data.value: e.g. In front of the park

data.name: MapaRellenaraDesc
data.value: The map will auto-fill these fields.

data.name: GestionaDireccionesDesc
data.value: Manage your delivery addresses to speed up your orders.

data.name: SinDirecciones
data.value: You have no registered addresses yet.

data.name: AgregaPrimeraDireccionDesc
data.value: Add your first address to start ordering.

data.name: BuscaBarrioMapaActDesc
data.value: Search your neighborhood or street and click on the map to update coordinates.

data.name: MapaActualizaraDesc
data.value: The map will update these fields.

data.name: ConfirmarEliminarDireccion
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this address?

data.name: SeguroEliminarFavorito
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this?

data.name: QueTeParecioComidaPlaceholder
data.value: How was the food and service?

data.name: RevisaHistorialDesc
data.value: Check your purchase history and status.

data.name: NoTienesPedidosRegistrados
data.value: You have no registered orders yet.

data.name: ErrorAgregarProducto
data.value: Could not add the product. You might need to empty your cart if it is from another restaurant.

data.name: RegistrarDireccionError
data.value: You need to register an address before confirming your order.

data.name: UbicacionValidaError
data.value: You must provide a valid location on the map.

data.name: ErrorGuardarUbicacion
data.value: Could not save the location in the system.

data.name: DireccionInvalidaError
data.value: You must select a valid delivery address.

data.name: TarjetaInvalidaError
data.value: The card number is invalid (Luhn validation failed).

data.name: TarjetaNoSoportadaError
data.value: The card is not Visa, Mastercard, Amex or Discover.

data.name: ErrorProcesarPedido
data.value: There was a problem processing your order. Please try again.

data.name: CuponUtilizadoError
data.value: This coupon has already been used.

data.name: CuponAgregadoError
data.value: This coupon has already been added.

data.name: DireccionAsociadaPedidoError
data.value: The address cannot be deleted because it is associated with one or more orders in history.

data.name: NoHaySolicitudesPendientes
data.value: There are no pending requests at this time.

data.name: SeguroDenegarSolicitud
data.value: Are you sure you want to deny the request of

data.name: SeguroDenegarSolicitudRest
data.value: Are you sure you want to deny the request for the restaurant

data.name: VistaBasicaAdminParaAprobarRep
data.value: Basic view for the administrator. To approve or reject, go to Requests.

data.name: VistaBasicaAdminParaAprobarRest
data.value: Basic view for the administrator. To approve or reject, go to Requests.

data.name: VistaBasicaLecturaUsuarios
data.value: This is a basic read-only view to avoid 404 errors.

data.name: BienvenidoCentroControl
data.value: Welcome to the RayoExpres control center. From here you can manage all system modules.

data.name: ControlGeneralCatalogoDesc
data.value: General control of the product catalog.

data.name: ModeracionResenasDesc
data.value: Moderation of restaurant and driver reviews.

data.name: ConfirmarEliminarMsg
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this?

data.name: LimiteUsosTag
data.value: Usage Limit (0 or empty = No limit)

data.name: NoRestaurantesBusqueda
data.value: No restaurants found with that term.

data.name: NoProductosBusqueda
data.value: No products found with that term.

data.name: SolicitudRecibida
data.value: Your registration request has been received and is currently Pending Approval.

data.name: AdminRevisaraBreve
data.value: An administrator will review your information shortly. You will receive a notification when your account is approved and you can access the dashboard.

data.name: EntregasRapidasDesc
data.value: Our drivers are always nearby so your food arrives hot.

data.name: PagosSegurosDesc
data.value: Multiple payment methods backed by strict security standards.

data.name: MejoresLocalesDesc
data.value: The best restaurants in town in one place.

data.name: BuscaDesc
data.value: Find the restaurant or dish you want.

data.name: PideDesc
data.value: Add to your cart and apply your coupons.

data.name: PagaDesc
data.value: Use cash, card or transfer safely.

data.name: IniciaSesionVerMenu
data.value: Log in to view the menu

data.name: NoRestaurantesDisponibles
data.value: There are no restaurants available at this time.

data.name: SolicitudRechazadaDesc
data.value: We regret to inform you that your registration request has been rejected by an administrator.

data.name: RechazoSoporte
data.value: For more information or if you think this is an error, please contact support.

data.name: NoProductosDisponiblesRest
data.value: This restaurant does not have products available yet.

data.name: SinPermisosAcceso
data.value: You do not have the necessary permissions to access this page.

data.name: RecuperarDesc
data.value: Enter your email and we will send you instructions to reset your password.

data.name: BienvenidoRepartidorMsg
data.value: Welcome. Manage your deliveries and update your status.

data.name: CuentaPendienteMsg
data.value: Your request has been sent successfully. An administrator will review your information and approve or reject your account. In the meantime, you can log in, but your functions will be blocked.

data.name: CuentaRechazadaMsg
data.value: Your request has been rejected by an administrator. Check your notifications for the reason. You cannot operate on the platform.

data.name: NoPedidosAsignados
data.value: You have no assigned orders yet.

data.name: RestaurantePendienteMsg
data.value: Your restaurant is under review by an administrator. In the meantime, you can log in, but your functions will be blocked.

data.name: RestauranteRechazadoMsg
data.value: Your restaurant request has been rejected by an administrator. Check your notifications for the reason.

data.name: BienvenidoRestauranteMsg
data.value: Welcome to your restaurant management. Here you can manage your products and view the orders assigned to you.

data.name: MisProductosDesc
data.value: Manage your product catalog and prices.

data.name: PedidosActivosDesc
data.value: Review customer orders and change their statuses.
